features.featureTitle: Create a visually striking hero section at the top of the homepage displaying the salon name 'Magic Hair Salon', the open/closed status badge (currently Open, closes at 9:00 PM), a 4.9/5 star rating with 265 reviews, and a prominent WhatsApp booking call-to-action button linking to wa.me/+918129529732.

Build a comprehensive Services section that organizes all offered services into clearly labeled category cards: Hair Services (Haircut, Hairstyling, Blow dry, Hair extensions, Balayage, Perms, Dreadlocks, Braids/Box braids, Shampoo & conditioning), Skin & Beauty (Facials, Skin care, Acne treatments, Make-up & bridal make-up, Microblading, Permanent makeup, Lash lift/Lash perms, Eyelash extensions, Eyebrow threading & shaping), Body Services (Waxing/Body waxing, Laser hair removal, Permanent hair removal, Pedicure, Manicure, Massage, Spa services, Tanning), Bridal & Event Services (Bridal services, Wedding & event preparation), and Other (Online booking, Mobile salon service, Shaving).

Add a Location & Contact section displaying the full address (Nate Adattu Avenue, 1st Floor, Old Market Road, Junction, near Kurishupally, Pala, Kerala 686575), a clickable phone/WhatsApp link for 081295 29732 (formatted as +91 81295 29732), and a WhatsApp chat button. Include a 'Get Directions' link that opens Google Maps with the salon address pre-filled.

Apply a luxurious, elegant visual theme across the entire website: use a warm champagne and deep charcoal color palette with gold accent tones, refined serif or elegant sans-serif typography, soft gradient backgrounds, and smooth card-based layouts. The design should feel premium and beauty-focused, consistent with a high-end unisex salon brand. Ensure full mobile responsiveness throughout all sections.
